name: JetBlue Airways

carryOn.notes: Blue Basic fare allows only one personal item. Blue and higher fares include one carry-on and one personal item.

economy.notes: $35 for first bag on Blue Basic and Blue. Free on Blue Plus, Blue Extra, and Mint.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Spare lithium batteries must be in carry-on baggage only
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Carry-on only. Max 100Wh without approval. 101–160Wh requires approval. Over 160Wh prohibited.
batteryRules.laptops: Permitted in carry-on. Comply with TSA screening requirements.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with lithium batteries that cannot be removed

faqs.question: Does JetBlue Blue Basic include a carry-on bag?
faqs.answer: No. JetBlue Blue Basic fare only includes one personal item that fits under the seat. A carry-on bag in the overhead bin requires an additional fee unless you have TrueBlue Mosaic status.

faqs.question: How much does JetBlue charge for checked bags?
faqs.answer: Blue Basic and Blue fares charge $35 for the first bag and $45 for the second. Blue Plus and higher include the first checked bag free. Mint passengers get two free checked bags.

faqs.question: Are power banks allowed on JetBlue?
faqs.answer: Power banks must travel in carry-on baggage only. Power banks 100Wh and under are permitted without restriction. Between 101–160Wh requires JetBlue approval before travel.
